prompt: Create a premium dark luxury hero background for a motion-first digital designer portfolio. The scene should feel cinematic, futuristic, editorial, and high contrast, with refined depth, subtle reflective surfaces, and a strong sense of craft. Leave generous negative space for typography on the left side. Avoid generic stock-photo style, recognizable brands, copyrighted characters, logos, and readable text. Use a sophisticated black, graphite, deep teal, and warm gold accent palette. Output should be suitable as a website hero background.
cost_note: Low-quality 1024x1024 hosted test generation; confirm exact cost in OpenAI usage dashboard.
rights_review_note: Generated from text only with no private/client assets, logos, copyrighted characters, or readable text requested. Treat as test artifact pending model/provider usage review before publication.
quality_notes: Strong premium dark cinematic background with generous left-side negative space; refined but slightly abstract architectural geometry; suitable for a hero background.
